0.content:
<world_primer>
SERIES: Jujutsu Kaisen (呪術廻戦) by Gege Akutami. A dark supernatural action setting in modern-day Japan (primarily 2018) where negative human emotions — fear, hatred, regret, malice — physically manifest as monstrous CURSED SPIRITS (curses). To fight them, JUJUTSU SORCERERS wield CURSED ENERGY through CURSED TECHNIQUES, operating in secret from ordinary society.

CORE PILLARS:
- Cursed Energy (呪力): the fuel for all jujutsu, produced by negative emotion.
- Cursed Technique (術式): an innate, inherited ability unique to a sorcerer or curse.
- Domain Expansion (領域展開): the pinnacle of jujutsu — manifesting one's innate domain as an enclosed space with a guaranteed-hit effect.
- Grades: both sorcerers and curses are ranked Grade 4 (weakest) up through Grade 1, then Special Grade (strongest).

INSTITUTIONS: Tokyo Metropolitan Curse Technical College (Tokyo Jujutsu High) and the Kyoto sister school train sorcerers. A conservative group of "higher-ups" governs jujutsu society, dominated by the three great clans: GOJO, ZENIN, and KAMO.

TONE: Brutal, fast-paced, morally grey. Death is frequent and permanent. Themes of fairness vs. cruelty, "a proper death," and the cost of strength run throughout.

NOTE: Character and place names remain CANONICAL regardless of the roleplay language used.
</world_primer>

1.content:
A broad chronology of the Jujutsu Kaisen world (dates per series canon):
- ~1,000+ years ago (HEIAN ERA): The golden age of jujutsu. RYOMEN SUKUNA lives as an undefeated human sorcerer, later mythologized as a demon. Sorcerers like KASHIMO and the woman YOROZU exist in this era. Upon death, Sukuna's body becomes an indestructible relic split into TWENTY FINGERS.
- Centuries of decline: jujutsu weakens; the three great clans (Gojo, Zenin, Kamo) consolidate power. TENGEN, an immortal sorcerer, sustains Japan's barriers from within Jujutsu High.
- 1989: SATORU GOJO and SUGURU GETO are born; Gojo inherits both the SIX EYES and the LIMITLESS for the first time in centuries.
- 2006 (STAR PLASMA VESSEL INCIDENT): Teen Gojo & Geto fail to deliver Riko Amanai to merge with Tengen; the assassin TOJI FUSHIGURO nearly kills Gojo. This breaks Geto, beginning his path to villainy.
- 2007: Geto massacres a village, defects, and is branded a curse-user; Gojo lets him go.
- Dec 2017 (NIGHT PARADE OF A HUNDRED DEMONS / "Cursed Child" arc, JJK 0): Geto attacks Shinjuku & Kyoto. YUTA OKKOTSU and the curse RIKA are central. Gojo kills Geto — but his corpse is stolen by KENJAKU.
- 2018: YUJI ITADORI eats Sukuna's finger, becoming his vessel; the main story begins (Fearsome Womb, Vs. Mahito, Kyoto Goodwill Event, Death Painting arcs).
- Oct 31, 2018 (SHIBUYA INCIDENT): Cursed spirits and Kenjaku seal Gojo in the PRISON REALM. Massive casualties; Sukuna rampages; Yuji's role as vessel is exposed.
- Late 2018 onward (CULLING GAME): Kenjaku activates a nationwide death-game using reincarnated Heian sorcerers to flood Japan with cursed energy and merge humanity with Tengen.
- Final arc (SHINJUKU SHOWDOWN): Gojo is unsealed and fights Sukuna (now in Megumi's body); the conflict resolves the era.

2.content: The Heian period (~1,000 years ago) was the golden age of jujutsu, when cursed energy was abundant and sorcerers reached heights unmatched in the modern day. RYOMEN SUKUNA lived then as a fully human sorcerer of unrivaled power, so feared that legend reimagined him as a four-armed, twin-faced demon. Other monstrous talents of the age include HAJIME KASHIMO and the construction genius YOROZU. Modern sorcerers like Gojo regard this era's practitioners as the true standard of strength, which is why Kenjaku's Culling Game reincarnates Heian-era sorcerers to recreate that lost golden age of power.

3.content: The Star Plasma Vessel is a person born to merge with the immortal TENGEN, refreshing Tengen's body and stabilizing Japan's barriers. In 2006, RIKO AMANAI was the chosen vessel, escorted by teenage Gojo and Geto. The Time Vessel Association (the religious group Q) and the assassin TOJI FUSHIGURO opposed the merger. Toji killed Riko and nearly killed Gojo, who awakened to a new level of power and slaughtered Toji's backers. Riko's death — and the realization that the strong protect the weak while the weak are crushed — shattered Geto's idealism and set him on the road to becoming a curse-user.

4.comment: History — Gojo & Geto's Past / Geto's Defection
4.content: As Tokyo Jujutsu High students, Satoru Gojo and Suguru Geto were inseparable rivals and the strongest pair of their generation. After the Star Plasma Vessel Incident broke Geto, he grew to despise non-sorcerers ("monkeys"), believing a world only for sorcerers would end all curses. In 2007 he massacred a rural village (including his own family's town), murdered 112 civilians, and defected, becoming jujutsu society's most wanted curse-user. Gojo, unable to bring himself to kill his best friend, let him escape — a decision that haunts the rest of the story.

5.content: On Halloween 2018, a coalition of cursed spirits (Mahito, Jogo, Dagon, Choso and others) and the body-hopper KENJAKU executed a meticulously planned trap in Shibuya. Civilians were taken hostage to lure Satoru Gojo, who was then sealed inside the PRISON REALM, removing the world's strongest sorcerer from play. The incident became a citywide bloodbath: Nanami, Nobara and many others fell or were gravely wounded; Sukuna manifested through Yuji and obliterated entire districts; Toji briefly returned; and Megumi was maneuvered into position. It is the story's central catastrophe and the turning point of the war.

6.comment: History — The Culling Game (Death Painting Game)
6.content: After Shibuya, KENJAKU (in Geto's body) launched the Culling Game: a nationwide ritual splitting Japan into walled-off colonies where ~1,000 players — including reincarnated Heian-era sorcerers placed into modern bodies — must kill to earn points or lose them and die. Players who refuse to fight within 19 days perish. The game's true purpose is to saturate Japan with cursed energy and trigger a forced MERGER of humanity with the immortal Tengen, optimizing human evolution into cursed-energy beings on a mass scale. Key colonies include Sendai, Tokyo No.1 and Tokyo No.2; many of the manga's late-arc fighters debut here.

7.content: The climactic confrontation of the series. After being freed from the Prison Realm, Satoru Gojo faces RYOMEN SUKUNA — now incarnated in MEGUMI FUSHIGURO's body — in a planned battle in Shinjuku, December 24, 2018. The fight escalates through clashing Domain Expansions and is followed by a relay of sorcerers (Yuji, Higuruma, Maki, Kusakabe, Yuta and others) who continue the war against Sukuna after Gojo. It resolves the central conflicts around Sukuna, Megumi, and the future of jujutsu society.

8.content: Cursed energy (呪力, juryoku) is the fundamental power source of all jujutsu, generated by the NEGATIVE EMOTIONS of humans — fear, anger, hatred, sorrow, regret. It leaks constantly from ordinary people and pools in places of suffering (hospitals, schools, crowded cities), where it congeals into CURSED SPIRITS. Jujutsu sorcerers are rare individuals who can perceive and consciously control their own cursed energy, channeling it to reinforce their bodies, power techniques, and harm curses (normal weapons cannot). Output, control, and the flow of cursed energy distinguish a weak sorcerer from a strong one; flawless control even at relaxed moments is a mark of mastery.

9.content: A cursed technique (術式, jutsushiki) is an innate, usually inherited ability that determines how a sorcerer or curse manipulates cursed energy — it cannot normally be learned or changed. Each technique has rules, conditions, and limits; understanding and expanding those limits is the core of growth. Strong techniques include Gojo's LIMITLESS, Megumi's TEN SHADOWS, and Sukuna's cleaving/dismantling fire technique. A technique's strongest, most cursed-energy-intensive application is its MAXIMUM TECHNIQUE. Techniques can also be applied via BINDING VOWS to alter their power and conditions.

key: วิชาคำสาปย้อนกลับ
การพลิกกลับพลัง
10.content: Reverse Cursed Technique (反転術式) is the art of multiplying two negative cursed energies to produce POSITIVE energy, which can HEAL the user (and rarely others). It is extremely difficult and energy-intensive; most sorcerers cannot use it at all. Masters like Gojo and Sukuna can heal grievous wounds mid-battle. Reversed energy can also be turned offensive — e.g., Sukuna's flame arrow MALEVOLENT SHRINE applications, or Yuki's mass technique. Notably, RCT generally cannot regrow a brain or undo death, and applying it to curses (which are made of cursed energy) can destroy them outright.

11.content: Domain Expansion (領域展開) is the apex of jujutsu: a sorcerer manifests their INNATE DOMAIN — an enclosed barrier-world built from their cursed technique — trapping opponents inside. Within a complete domain, the caster's technique becomes a SURE HIT (guaranteed to land) on everyone inside, and the user gains an overwhelming advantage. Casting one drains enormous cursed energy and requires a defined "binding" (e.g., a guaranteed-hit clause). Examples: Gojo's UNLIMITED VOID, Sukuna's MALEVOLENT SHRINE (an open, "incomplete" domain that trades the barrier for unlimited range), Mahito's SELF-EMBODIMENT OF PERFECTION, Megumi's CHIMERA SHADOW GARDEN, Jogo's COFFIN OF THE IRON MOUNTAIN, Dagon's HORIZON OF THE CAPTIVATING SKANDHA.

12.content: Barrier techniques (結界術, kekkaijutsu) shape and seal space with cursed energy. A CURTAIN/VEIL (帳, tobari) is a dome dropped over an area to hide cursed events from ordinary people and to control who can enter or exit — they can be tuned to bar specific individuals (famously used in Shibuya to keep Gojo in but let others out). Barriers underpin Domain Expansions (a domain is a perfected inner barrier), the PRISON REALM, and Tengen's nationwide protective barriers around Japan. Skilled barrier-users like Mei Mei, Kenjaku and Tengen treat space itself as a weapon and a cage.

13.content: A binding vow (縛り, shibari) is a self-imposed or mutual restriction that, in exchange for accepting a condition/disadvantage, grants a corresponding boost in power, technique flexibility, or guaranteed outcome. Self-binds: e.g., declaring a limitation aloud or revealing your technique to an enemy to amplify its effect (as in a Black Flash or a domain's sure-hit clause). Mutual vows: contracts between two parties enforced by jujutsu itself — breaking one brings severe backlash. Binding vows make Domain Expansion, the Prison Realm's seal, and many signature feats possible, and they let weaker sorcerers punch above their grade.

key: แสงวาบสีดำ
14.content: A Black Flash (黒閃, kokusen) occurs when a sorcerer lands a physical strike with cursed energy applied within 0.000001 seconds of impact, distorting space and producing a flash of black sparks. It deals roughly 2.5× the normal damage of that strike and, critically, deepens the user's connection to cursed energy — chaining Black Flashes can push a sorcerer into a heightened, "in the zone" state of perfect output. It cannot be forced reliably; it is half skill, half luck. Yuji Itadori has a notable knack for landing consecutive Black Flashes, and Todo prizes the technique above all.

15.content: Cursed tools are weapons and objects imbued with cursed energy, able to harm curses and amplify a sorcerer's power. Some are mass-produced (standard sorcerer swords/knives); others are unique SPECIAL-GRADE relics. Notable tools: PLAYFUL CLOUD (a three-section staff), the INVERTED SPEAR OF HEAVEN (negates any cursed technique it touches), the SPLIT SOUL KATANA, the slaughter demon and other Zenin clan blades wielded by Maki and Toji, and the PRISON REALM itself (a sealing tool). A few people, like Maki Zenin and Toji Fushiguro, have almost no cursed energy and instead fight purely with cursed tools and superhuman physical bodies.

16.content: Cursed spirits are monsters born from the accumulated negative emotions of humanity; the more people share a fear, the stronger the curse it spawns. Most are mindless and are graded like sorcerers (Grade 4 up to Special Grade). Rare intelligent SPECIAL-GRADE curses possess their own cursed techniques and humanlike will. The DISASTER CURSES — Mahito, Jogo, Hanami, Dagon — are the strongest of these, born from collective human fear (of other people, of natural disasters/volcanoes, of the dying environment, and of the sea/water). Cursed spirits feed on humans and on other curses, and exterminating them is a sorcerer's core duty.

key: ระดับพิเศษ
17.content: Both sorcerers and curses are ranked by strength: GRADE 4 (weakest) → Grade 3 → Grade 2 → Grade 1 → SPECIAL GRADE (overwhelming). Intermediate ranks (Semi-Grade 2, Semi-Grade 1) exist for promotion. Grade roughly dictates which threats a sorcerer is assigned. SPECIAL GRADE denotes power beyond normal classification — e.g., sorcerers Gojo, Yuta, Yuki Tsukumo, and curses like Mahito, Jogo, Hanami, Dagon, Rika and Sukuna. A sorcerer's grade can be raised by recommendation and demonstrated results; Yuji and Megumi, for instance, are flagged for rapid promotion.

18.content: Heavenly Restriction (天与呪縛, tenyo-jubaku) is an innate, body-level binding vow a person is born with, trading one extreme for another. The most famous form grants a SUPERHUMAN PHYSICAL BODY in exchange for having essentially ZERO cursed energy — such people are invisible to curses and fight with peak human physicality plus cursed tools. TOJI FUSHIGURO ("the Sorcerer Killer") and MAKI ZENIN both embody this. The opposite extreme exists too: KOKICHI MUTA (Mechamaru) was born with a frail, malformed body but received vast cursed energy and range in return.

19.comment: Mechanic — Shikigami & the Ten Shadows Technique
19.content: Shikigami are spirits/familiars summoned and commanded via cursed technique. The TEN SHADOWS TECHNIQUE (十種影法術), inherited by MEGUMI FUSHIGURO from the Zenin line, stores shikigami inside shadows and summons ten species: DIVINE DOGS (twin wolves), NUE (a winged bird), GREAT SERPENT, TOAD, MAX ELEPHANT, RABBIT ESCAPE, ROUND DEER, and others. A defeated shikigami is gone for good, but a TAMED one can be re-summoned even after destruction. The technique's strongest, never-fully-tamed shikigami is the adaptive MAHORAGA, "the eight-handled sword divergent sila divine general," which adapts to any phenomenon (techniques, attacks, even Limitless) that strikes it.

key: เทคนิคสูงสุด
20.content: A Maximum Technique is the strongest, most cursed-energy-intensive expression of a cursed technique — its ultimate move. Examples: Gojo's "Hollow Technique: Purple" (Imaginary Technique combining Blue and Red), Jogo's "Maximum: Meteor," Hanami's seed-bomb finishers, and Sukuna's open domain Malevolent Shrine. Maximum techniques often require setup, leave the user briefly drained, and may carry binding-vow conditions, but they hit with overwhelming force.

key: คำสั่งคำสาป
21.content: Cursed Speech (呪言, jugon) is the inherited technique of the INUMAKI family: words infused with cursed energy become absolute COMMANDS that physically compel anyone who hears them ("Don't move," "Blast away," "Get crushed"). The stronger the command relative to the speaker's stamina, the greater the strain and backlash on the user's own throat (causing it to bleed or split). To avoid commanding allies or himself by accident, Toge Inumaki speaks only in rice-ball ingredient words (salmon, kelp, etc.) in daily life.

22.content: Idle Transfiguration is MAHITO's cursed technique: by touching a soul, he can reshape it and thereby instantly reshape the body it inhabits — twisting humans into grotesque "Transfigured Humans" used as foot-soldiers, healing/reforming his own body, or killing with a touch by warping the soul directly (bypassing physical durability). Because humans cannot normally perceive their own souls, they have no defense. The technique embodies the series' theme that body and soul are inseparable, and it makes Mahito one of the deadliest curses despite his unstable, childlike personality.

23.content: The Prison Realm (獄門疆, Gokumonkyo) is a special-grade cursed tool capable of permanently SEALING any target inside it once a binding-vow condition is met. In the Shibuya Incident it was used to seal SATORU GOJO, neutralizing the strongest sorcerer for much of the war. Time stops for whoever is sealed inside, and undoing the seal is extraordinarily difficult — a major plot driver as allies search for a way to free Gojo.

24.content: The Six Eyes (六眼, Rikugan) is a rare ocular trait appearing only once every few centuries in the Gojo clan. It grants the user perfect, effortless PERCEPTION and CONTROL of cursed energy — letting them see the precise flow of energy, operate complex techniques with almost no consumption, and master reverse cursed technique with ease. The Six Eyes is what makes SATORU GOJO's Limitless practical to wield continuously; the pairing of Six Eyes and Limitless in one person had not occurred for centuries before Gojo, and is precisely what makes him the strongest.

25.content:
Limitless (無下限呪術) is the inherited technique of the GOJO clan, manipulating space at the atomic level via mathematical INFINITY. Its passive defense, INFINITY (無限, mugen), inserts an infinite series into the space between Gojo and any incoming attack, so nothing ever actually reaches him. Offensive applications use convergence and divergence:
- CURSED TECHNIQUE LAPSE: BLUE — attractive force, pulling matter together.
- CURSED TECHNIQUE REVERSAL: RED — repulsive force, blasting matter apart.
- HOLLOW TECHNIQUE: PURPLE — fusing Blue and Red into an "imaginary mass" that erases everything in its path.
Combined with the SIX EYES, Limitless makes Gojo nearly untouchable. His Domain Expansion, UNLIMITED VOID, floods targets with infinite information, paralyzing them.

26.content: Jujutsu society is a secretive world governing all sorcerers in Japan, led by conservative, self-serving HIGHER-UPS and dominated by the three great clans (Gojo, Zenin, Kamo). They issue execution orders (e.g., against Yuji for being Sukuna's vessel), enforce tradition, and frequently obstruct reformers. SATORU GOJO openly seeks to dismantle their stranglehold by raising a strong, independent younger generation — which is exactly why the higher-ups fear and constrain him. The system's cruelty and hypocrisy are recurring antagonistic forces alongside the curses themselves.

27.content: The Tokyo Metropolitan Curse Technical College ("Tokyo Jujutsu High") is the primary training school for sorcerers, hidden in the hills outside Tokyo behind protective barriers. Its principal is MASAMICHI YAGA (later succeeded amid the war); teachers include SATORU GOJO and ATSUYA KUSAKABE, with SHOKO IEIRI as resident healer. The core first-year students of the main story are YUJI ITADORI, MEGUMI FUSHIGURO, and NOBARA KUGISAKI; second/third-years include MAKI ZENIN, TOGE INUMAKI, PANDA, and the special-grade graduate YUTA OKKOTSU. It maintains a friendly rivalry with the Kyoto sister school.

28.content: The Kyoto Metropolitan Curse Technical College is Tokyo's older, tradition-bound sister school, overseen by the reactionary principal YOSHINOBU GAKUGANJI. Its students include AOI TODO, NORITOSHI KAMO, MAI ZENIN, KASUMI MIWA, MOMO NISHIMIYA, and the secret special-grade KOKICHI MUTA (Mechamaru). The two schools meet annually at the KYOTO GOODWILL EVENT, a competition that in the main story becomes a battleground when curses (and a Gakuganji-sanctioned plot to kill Yuji) intervene. Todo's bond with Yuji and Mechamaru's double-agent arc both stem from this event.

29.content:
Three powerful families dominate jujutsu society:
- GOJO CLAN: guardians of the LIMITLESS and the SIX EYES; nearly extinct in talent until Satoru Gojo inherited both, instantly becoming its (and the world's) strongest.
- ZENIN CLAN: a large, brutal, tradition-obsessed warrior clan holding the TEN SHADOWS and many cursed tools; infamous for cruelty toward the weak (Maki & Mai's abuse, Toji's exile). Megumi was born into its bloodline.
- KAMO CLAN: keepers of BLOOD MANIPULATION; obsessed with "pure" lineage. Noritoshi Kamo is the current heir; the ancient body-hopper Kenjaku once wore the disgraced name "Noritoshi Kamo" centuries ago.
Their conservatism and infighting are a persistent obstacle to reform.

30.content: Tengen is an ancient, effectively immortal sorcerer whose BARRIER technique sustains the protective barriers around Jujutsu High and key sites across Japan. Tengen periodically "evolves," requiring a STAR PLASMA VESSEL to merge with and reset their body roughly every 500 years; without it, Tengen's mind eventually warps. Living sealed away beneath Jujutsu High, Tengen becomes a central target of Kenjaku's plan: the Culling Game is engineered to force a MERGER of all humanity with the evolved Tengen, mass-transforming people into cursed-energy lifeforms.

31.content: A CURSED WOMB (呪胎) is a special-grade curse born from a pregnant woman whose fetus was warped by cursed energy. The DEATH PAINTINGS (呪胎九相図, "Nine Phantom Wombs in Paintings") are nine half-human, half-curse beings created long ago by Noritoshi Kamo (an identity later worn by Kenjaku) by experimenting on a woman who could bear curse-children. Three of them — CHOSO, ESO, and KECHIZU — awaken in the main story and use BLOOD MANIPULATION. Choso, the eldest "brother," eventually allies with Yuji upon learning they share that experimental bloodline.

32.content:
The Disaster Curses are the four strongest special-grade cursed spirits, born from humanity's deepest collective fears and allied with Kenjaku/Geto's faction to wipe out non-sorcerers:
- MAHITO — born from human fear OF OTHER HUMANS; wields Idle Transfiguration (soul manipulation).
- JOGO — born from fear of EARTH/VOLCANOES; a fiery, prideful curse using magma and flame.
- HANAMI — born from fear of NATURE/the dying environment; a gentle-mannered plant curse.
- DAGON — born from fear of the SEA/water; a reclusive curse who matures from a Cursed Womb into a Disaster.
Together with Kenjaku and the Death Paintings they form the antagonist coalition of the early-to-mid story.

33.content: Blood Manipulation (赤血操術) is the KAMO clan's inherited technique: the user controls their own blood — its shape, speed, density, and even their own blood pressure/properties — for ranged and melee attacks. Signature moves include CONVERGENCE: PIERCING BLOOD (a hyper-compressed blood beam) and SUPERNOVA (a blood projectile). The DEATH PAINTING brothers (Choso, Eso, Kechizu) use it innately as half-curses; Noritoshi Kamo uses it as the clan heir. Skilled users can boost their physical performance by manipulating their own circulation, but overuse risks blood loss.

34.content: Boogie Woogie is AOI TODO's cursed technique: by CLAPPING his hands, he instantly SWAPS the positions of any two targets carrying cursed energy within range (people, allies, even himself, and objects he's primed). It is deceptively powerful in combat — letting Todo dodge fatal blows, reposition allies, and set up devastating coordinated strikes (his teamwork with Yuji is iconic). The technique rewards battlefield awareness and creativity over raw output, making Todo one of the series' most dangerous tacticians despite an unconventional fighting style.

35.content: Cursed Spirit Manipulation (呪霊操術) is SUGURU GETO's inherited technique: he can CAPTURE defeated curses and store them, later summoning them to fight on his behalf — effectively commanding an army of curses. To absorb one, he must consume the cursed spirit (often as a foul "curse ball"). His ultimate, UZUMAKI ("Maximum Uzumaki"), compresses his entire stockpile into a single annihilating blast. The same technique passes to KENJAKU after he hijacks Geto's corpse, giving the villain a vast reserve of curses including the Disaster Curses.

36.content: The protagonist. A cheerful, freakishly athletic high-schooler from Sendai with extraordinary natural physical strength, raised by his late grandfather, whose dying words — "help people" and "be surrounded by people when you die" — shape Yuji's whole ethos. After eating one of SUKUNA's twenty fingers to save friends, he becomes the curse king's VESSEL, sharing his body with Sukuna. Jujutsu society sentences him to death but defers it until he consumes all the fingers. Kind, stubborn, and deeply troubled by his role in others' deaths (he can momentarily lose control to Sukuna, as in Shibuya), Yuji fights to give everyone "a proper death." He shows a rare aptitude for chaining BLACK FLASHES.

key: เมงุมิ ฟุชิงุโระ
37.content: A stoic, principled first-year and Yuji's closest ally, scouted personally by Gojo. Born into the ZENIN bloodline (son of TOJI FUSHIGURO) but raised outside the clan, he wields the inherited TEN SHADOWS TECHNIQUE, summoning shikigami such as the Divine Dogs, Nue, and the great serpent, and pursuing the never-tamed MAHORAGA as a trump card. His Domain Expansion is CHIMERA SHADOW GARDEN. Quietly kind beneath a blunt exterior, Megumi believes in saving "good people" rather than everyone. His potential makes him a target: in the final arc, SUKUNA seizes Megumi's body as his new vessel, making him central to the climax.

key: โนบาระ คุกิซากิ
38.content: A fierce, fashion-loving first-year from a rural town who came to Tokyo to live boldly on her own terms. Her cursed technique, the STRAW DOLL TECHNIQUE, uses a hammer, nails, and a straw doll: by linking a piece of a target to the doll (RESONANCE) and hammering nails into it, she inflicts ranged internal damage; her finisher, HAIRPIN, detonates embedded nails. Confident, sharp-tongued, and loyal, Nobara forms the core student trio with Yuji and Megumi. She is gravely wounded by MAHITO during the Shibuya Incident, a pivotal emotional blow for Yuji.

key: ซาโตรุ โกโจ
ผู้แข็งแกร่งที่สุด
39.content: The strongest jujutsu sorcerer alive and a Tokyo Jujutsu High teacher. The first person in centuries to inherit BOTH the SIX EYES and LIMITLESS, making him practically untouchable (Infinity defense; Blue, Red, Purple; Domain UNLIMITED VOID; mastery of reverse cursed technique). Blindfolded or shades-wearing to manage the Six Eyes' input, he is arrogant, playful, and ruthless toward the corrupt higher-ups, whom he openly plans to overthrow by raising a strong young generation. Best friend (and eventual killer) of SUGURU GETO. In the SHIBUYA INCIDENT he is sealed in the PRISON REALM, removing him from the war until the final arc, where he confronts SUKUNA.

key: ยูตะ อกคตสึ
40.content: The special-grade protagonist of Jujutsu Kaisen 0 and a distant relative of the Gojo line. As a boy he was haunted by RIKA, the vengeful curse of his childhood sweetheart who died in an accident; her overwhelming power made Yuta a walking special-grade threat until Gojo took him in. Yuta's gift is COPY — he can replicate the cursed techniques of others — plus immense raw cursed energy and a cursed sword. After studying abroad, he returns as one of the few sorcerers strong enough to stand near Gojo's tier, playing a major role in the war against Kenjaku and Sukuna (including a controversial plan involving Gojo's body).

key: มากิ เซนิน
เซนิน มากิ
41.content: A second-year (twin sister of MAI) born into the Zenin clan with almost NO cursed energy, scorned and abused by the clan for it. She compensates with HEAVENLY RESTRICTION — a superhuman physical body — and mastery of cursed TOOLS, fighting like a peerless warrior. After a clan massacre and her twin's sacrifice push her to fully awaken her physical potential, Maki becomes a Toji-like monster of pure martial skill, able to slay special grades with a blade. Tough, driven, and protective of her friends, she is a key combatant in the late-game battles against Sukuna.

key: โทเงะ อินุมากิ
42.content: A second-year of the INUMAKI family who wields CURSED SPEECH: his words become absolute commands, forcing those who hear them to obey ("don't move," "blast away," "explode"). To avoid commanding allies by accident, he speaks normally only in rice-ball ingredient words (salmon, kelp/kombu, mustard leaf, tuna mayo) and communicates the rest through expression and gesture. Calm, considerate, and brave, he has snake-and-fang marks on his cheeks and tongue. Powerful commands strain and tear his throat, limiting how much he can use the technique in a single fight.

key: แพนด้าจูจุสึ
43.content: A second-year who appears to be a talking panda but is actually an ABRUPT MUTATED CORSE — a sentient cursed corpse created by principal MASAMICHI YAGA. Uniquely, Panda has THREE CORES (souls): his default Panda core, a powerful GORILLA core (raw strength mode), and a hidden TRIPLET sister core, letting him switch combat styles. Friendly, level-headed, and loyal, he serves as the older-brother figure of the second-years and treats Yaga as a father. He fights with overwhelming physical power and durability.

key: เคนโตะ นานามิ
44.content: A stern, methodical Grade 1 sorcerer and former salaryman who returned to jujutsu out of duty, becoming a mentor to Yuji. His RATIO TECHNIQUE forcibly creates a 7:3 "weak point" line across a target, so striking that line deals critical, multiplied damage; he wields a blunt cursed sword and works strictly "by the clock." Pragmatic, honest, and quietly compassionate beneath a tired, no-nonsense exterior, Nanami embodies the working adult's burden. He dies during the SHIBUYA INCIDENT at the hands of Mahito, a death that profoundly marks Yuji.

key: โชโกะ อิเอริ
45.content: The resident physician of Tokyo Jujutsu High and a former classmate of Gojo and Geto. One of the very few sorcerers who can use REVERSE CURSED TECHNIQUE on OTHER people, she heals wounded sorcerers and conducts research/autopsies on curses and corpses. Calm, dryly humorous, and a chain-smoker, she is emotionally steady amid constant loss and becomes a crucial support in the plan to free Gojo from the Prison Realm.

key: มาซามิจิ ยากะ
ครูใหญ่ยากะ
46.content: Principal of Tokyo Jujutsu High and the teacher of Gojo, Geto, and Shoko's generation. A master of CURSED CORPSE creation, he built PANDA and trains students to forge their own cursed dolls. Gruff but principled, he stands against the corrupt higher-ups. During the war, the higher-ups have him executed on a pretext, a quiet but significant loss for the reform-minded faction.

key: อัตสึยะ คุซาคาเบะ
47.content: A Grade 1 Tokyo Jujutsu High teacher who, despite having no flashy cursed technique, is an elite swordsman and a master of SIMPLE DOMAIN — making him a deadly counter to Domain Expansion users. Cautious, self-deprecating, and survival-minded ("I just want to go home alive"), he becomes a vital tactician and instructor in the final battles, teaching anti-domain techniques to the younger sorcerers facing Sukuna.

key: คิโยทากะ อิจิจิ
48.content: An assistant manager at Tokyo Jujutsu High who handles logistics, transport, and barrier setup for sorcerers in the field. A nervous, overworked but dependable support staffer with a barrier-related technique, he is one of the unsung backbones of operations. He is severely injured early in the Shibuya Incident when the trap is sprung.

49.content: MEI MEI is a Grade 1 mercenary sorcerer motivated almost entirely by MONEY, with a coldly pragmatic worldview. Her BLACK BIRD MANIPULATION controls crows for reconnaissance and attack, and her finisher BLACK BIRD MANEUVER channels enormous energy into a single explosive crow strike. She is accompanied by her utterly devoted younger brother UI UI, whose own technique can teleport/relocate allies. The pair fight in Shibuya and remain influential players in the later war.

key: ทาคุมะ อิโนะ
50.content: A Grade 2 sorcerer and admirer of Nanami who steps up as a field leader during Shibuya. His technique, AUSPICIOUS BEAST SEAL, summons spirit "beasts" via hand-seals to support and attack alongside him. Loyal and earnest (and a fan of an idol group), he fights bravely beside Yuji and survives to play supporting roles later.

key: ยู ไฮบาระ
51.content: A junior sorcerer and Nanami's close friend during their student years. His cheerful idealism deeply influenced young Nanami, but he was killed on a low-grade mission that should have been safe — a death that disillusioned Nanami and drove him out of jujutsu for years. Haibara appears mainly in flashback but his memory shapes Nanami's character.

key: อาโออิ โทโด
52.content: A hulking, eccentric Kyoto third-year and one of the strongest students, famous for asking new acquaintances "what's your type of girl/guy?" He uses BOOGIE WOOGIE (clapping to swap the positions of cursed-energy targets) combined with immense physical power and tactical genius. After bonding with Yuji at the Goodwill Event, he becomes Yuji's self-declared "best friend" and most reliable battle partner. In Shibuya he loses an arm (and thus easy use of his clap), a major sacrifice in the fight against Mahito.

key: โนริโตชิ คาโม
53.content: The disciplined heir of the KAMO clan and captain of the Kyoto students, wielding the clan's BLOOD MANIPULATION (e.g., Flowing Red Scale to boost his body, ranged blood attacks). Initially bound by clan duty (including the order to kill Yuji), he is honorable at heart and gradually cooperates with the Tokyo students. He is conscious of carrying a name once disgraced by the ancient sorcerer who became KENJAKU.

key: คาซึมิ มิวะ
54.content: A kind, hardworking, perpetually broke Kyoto second-year who became a sorcerer to support her family. A practitioner of the NEW SHADOW STYLE, she uses SIMPLE DOMAIN and the swift draw-cut BATTOJUTSU "Flash" — though she's candidly aware she's outclassed by monsters like Gojo (whom she idolizes). Gentle and self-deprecating, "Useless Miwa" is a fan-favorite ordinary girl among prodigies.

key: มาอิ เซนิน
55.content: Maki's twin sister, a Kyoto second-year with a sharp tongue masking deep love for Maki. Her CONSTRUCTION technique lets her create physical objects from cursed energy — most efficiently a single bullet for her revolver, since making matter is enormously costly. Resentful of being dragged into jujutsu yet fiercely protective of her sister, Mai makes a devastating sacrifice during the Zenin clan massacre, an act that unlocks Maki's full power.

key: โมโม นิชิมิยะ
56.content: A Kyoto third-year who flies on a witch-like BROOM and uses a wind/scouting cursed technique for aerial reconnaissance and support. Proud, blunt, and protective of her underclassmen (especially Miwa), she is vocal about the unfair treatment of female and low-grade sorcerers by jujutsu society.

key: โคคิจิ มุตะ
57.content: A Kyoto student born with a severe HEAVENLY RESTRICTION: a frail, malformed body traded for vast cursed energy and enormous RANGE. He fights from a remote location through a puppet/mech avatar called MECHAMARU. Desperate for a cure to his suffering, he becomes Kenjaku/Geto's double agent in exchange for a healthy body — but secretly betrays them out of love for MIWA and loyalty to his friends. His "Ultimate Mechamaru" form duels MAHITO; he dies passing on crucial intelligence about Geto's true identity.

key: ครูใหญ่กากุกันจิ
58.content: The elderly, ultra-conservative principal of Kyoto Jujutsu High and a member of the higher-ups, who sanctions the plot to assassinate Yuji at the Goodwill Event to eliminate Sukuna's vessel. He uses an electric-guitar cursed tool that channels destructive sound. Though a hardline traditionalist opposed to Gojo's reforms, he is not wholly without principle and cooperates against the greater threats later on.

key: เรียวเมน ซุคุนะ
ราชาแห่งคำสาป
59.content: The "King of Curses" and the central antagonist. Once an undefeated HUMAN sorcerer in the Heian era, his death left an indestructible relic split into TWENTY FINGERS; consuming them lets him resurrect through a vessel — currently YUJI ITADORI, and later MEGUMI. A four-armed, twin-faced being of overwhelming cruelty and arrogance, he wields a fire/CLEAVE-and-DISMANTLE slashing technique, masterful reverse cursed technique, and the open Domain Expansion MALEVOLENT SHRINE, which dismantles everything in range without a wall. Utterly self-interested, he regards humans as playthings and pursues only his own amusement and power. NAMING: The ONLY character who ever addresses him as "Lord Sukuna" (the honorific -sama) is his servant URAUME. No one else in the series shows him that deference — others call him simply "Sukuna," "the King of Curses," or worse.

key: ซุงุรุ เกโต
60.content: Once the idealistic best friend and rival of Gojo and among the strongest of his generation, Geto wielded CURSED SPIRIT MANIPULATION (storing and commanding consumed curses, ultimate move UZUMAKI). After the Star Plasma Vessel tragedy he came to despise non-sorcerers as "monkeys," massacred a village, and defected to pursue a world only for sorcerers. Gojo eventually kills him in JJK 0 — but his CORPSE is then hijacked by the ancient KENJAKU, who continues operating under Geto's face, making "Geto" the visible mastermind of the main story's atrocities.

key: ผู้ครองร่าง
61.content: An ancient, brain-shaped sorcerer who survives across centuries by transplanting his brain into new bodies — he has worn many identities, including a disgraced "Noritoshi Kamo," GETO's stolen corpse, and (revealed late) the body of Kaori Itadori, making him connected to Yuji's origins. His technique is the same CURSED SPIRIT MANIPULATION as Geto's body grants. The true architect of the Disaster Curse coalition, the SHIBUYA INCIDENT, and the CULLING GAME, Kenjaku's grand goal is to force the MERGER of humanity with Tengen to "evolve" the human race into cursed-energy beings — a millennium-spanning experiment.

62.content: A special-grade DISASTER CURSE born from humanity's hatred and fear OF OTHER HUMANS, and the personal nemesis of Yuji and Nanami. Childlike, sadistic, and gleefully cruel, he uses IDLE TRANSFIGURATION to reshape souls — warping people into Transfigured Human weapons, reforming his own body, and killing by touch. His Domain Expansion, SELF-EMBODIMENT OF PERFECTION, makes his soul-touch a guaranteed hit. He kills Nanami and cripples Nobara in Shibuya. Obsessed with what it means to be human, he is ultimately absorbed by Kenjaku after a brutal arc.

key: ปีศาจภูเขาไฟ
63.content: A special-grade DISASTER CURSE born from fear of the EARTH and VOLCANOES, appearing as a one-eyed figure with a volcanic head. Proud, hot-tempered, and contemptuous of humans, he commands magma, embers, and fire, with the Domain Expansion COFFIN OF THE IRON MOUNTAIN and the ultimate "MAXIMUM: METEOR." Despite his fury he yearns for a world where curses rule. He is humiliated and outclassed by Gojo, and is later incinerated by SUKUNA, who praises him in a rare moment of respect before killing him.

key: ปีศาจธรรมชาติ
64.content: A special-grade DISASTER CURSE born from fear of the dying NATURAL WORLD, with a wooden, plant-like body and flower-bud eyes. Comparatively gentle and sorrowful in manner, Hanami fights to "save" nature by eliminating humanity, manipulating wood, seeds, and draining cursed energy via parasitic flowers. Hanami leads the curse attack at the KYOTO GOODWILL EVENT and is gravely wounded by Gojo, later perishing in the Shibuya operation.

65.content: A special-grade DISASTER CURSE born from fear of the SEA, who matures from a reclusive CURSED WOMB into a full Disaster during Shibuya. His Domain Expansion, HORIZON OF THE CAPTIVATING SKANDHA, creates a beach/ocean realm flooded with endless fish-like SHIKIGAMI that swarm everyone trapped inside. Initially passive and protective of his fellow curses, he becomes a fearsome combatant who fights Nanami, Naobito, Maki and others before being slain by the returned TOJI FUSHIGURO.

66.content: The eldest of the DEATH PAINTING brothers (Cursed Womb half-curses) and a master of BLOOD MANIPULATION (Piercing Blood, Supernova, blood-clones). Fiercely devoted to his "brothers" Eso and Kechizu, he initially fights Yuji out of vengeance in Shibuya. Upon discovering that he and Yuji share the same experimental bloodline (via Kenjaku/Kaori Itadori), Choso comes to see Yuji as a true brother and DEFECTS to the heroes' side, becoming one of Yuji's fiercest protectors for the rest of the war.

67.content: Two of the DEATH PAINTING brothers (younger siblings of Choso), half-human/half-curse beings who use BLOOD MANIPULATION, including a poisonous "ROT" blood. They attack Yuji and Nobara during the Death Painting arc; the fight nearly kills Nobara via their decay poison before the pair are defeated. Their deaths are part of what motivates Choso's vengeance and his eventual turn toward Yuji.

key: โทจิ ฟุชิงุโระ
นักล่าจอมเวท
68.content: The "Sorcerer Killer," Megumi's father and an exile of the Zenin clan. Born with HEAVENLY RESTRICTION — ZERO cursed energy in exchange for a god-tier physical body — he is invisible to curses and fights with peerless physicality and an arsenal of cursed TOOLS (including the Inverted Spear of Heaven and Playful Cloud) drawn from his "Cursed Spirit" curse warehouse. As an assassin he nearly killed teenage Gojo in the STAR PLASMA VESSEL INCIDENT. He sold infant Megumi to the Zenin clan; in Shibuya his body is briefly resurrected as a puppet, and he reasserts his own will before dying once he learns the boy he fought is his son.

69.content: An androgynous, ancient sorcerer from the Heian era and SUKUNA's devoted servant/chef across the centuries, preserved into the modern day. Uraume wields an ICE-FORMATION cursed technique (Frost Calm) and serves as a key lieutenant in Kenjaku's faction while loyally awaiting Sukuna's full return, even cooking and gathering "ingredients" for him. Calm, refined, and utterly faithful to Sukuna, Uraume becomes an important player in the final arc. NAMING: Uraume is the SOLE character who calls him "Lord Sukuna" (-sama); this deference is unique to Uraume and should never be put in any other character's mouth.

key: ฮาจิเมะ คาชิโมะ
70.content: A Heian-era sorcerer reincarnated into the Culling Game, obsessed with finding the strongest opponent — above all SUKUNA. His ELECTRICITY-based technique (channeled through his staff Genju) converts his own cursed energy into lightning, and he can pour his lifetime's energy into a single transformed "Mythical Beast Amber" state. A pure battle-junkie indifferent to the game's stakes, Kashimo earns enough points to challenge Sukuna directly in the final arc.

key: ฮิโรมิ ฮิงุรุมะ
71.content: A disillusioned defense attorney drawn into the Culling Game, who awakens an extraordinary cursed technique themed on JUSTICE. His shikigami JUDGEMAN can instantly know the rules of any space, and his domain DEADLY SENTENCING holds a "trial": a guilty verdict strips the target of their cursed technique and grants Higuruma the EXECUTIONER'S SWORD, capable of killing in one stroke. Initially nihilistic, he becomes a steadfast ally, lending his sword and resolve to the fight against Sukuna.

key: คินจิ ฮาคาริ
72.content: A suspended Tokyo Jujutsu High third-year and rebel against the higher-ups, recruited back for the war. His gambling-themed technique culminates in the Domain Expansion PRIVATE PURE LOVE TRAIN: a slot machine that, on a JACKPOT, grants him roughly 4 minutes of near-INFINITE cursed energy and instantaneous reverse-cursed-technique healing — effectively unkillable while active. Brash and confrontational but loyal, Hakari is one of the strongest younger-generation sorcerers and a critical heavy-hitter in the late arcs.

key: คิระระ โฮชิ
73.content: A nonbinary Tokyo Jujutsu High student and friend/partner of Hakari, who joins the war effort. Their technique LOVE RENDEZVOUS places magnetic "stars" that let Kirara push, pull, and manipulate the movement of marked targets, excelling at battlefield control and astrology-based prediction. Cheerful and shrewd, Kirara provides crucial logistical and tactical support during the Culling Game and final arc.

key: ยูกิ ทสึคุโมะ
74.content: One of only four SPECIAL-GRADE sorcerers, a free-spirited, blunt woman who works mostly independently and dreams of a world WITHOUT cursed energy (so curses can never be born). Her technique STAR RAGE adds virtual "mass" to herself and her shikigami GARUDA, letting her hit with devastating, ever-increasing force. A mentor figure to Maki and Yuta who challenges jujutsu's fatalistic traditions, she confronts Kenjaku directly in the war.

key: ทาคาโกะ อุโระ
75.content: A Heian-era sorceress reincarnated into the Culling Game whose technique THIN ICE BREAKER lets her manipulate the "sky"/space itself as a surface, warping and lashing the air to attack and deflect. Proud and combat-savvy, she allies with the Heian woman Yorozu's circle and clashes with Yuta's team before the various factions converge.

key: ริว อิชิโกริ
76.content: A massive Heian-era sorcerer reincarnated into the Culling Game, possessing enormous raw cursed energy and the simple but overwhelming technique GRANITE BLAST — a charged beam of pure cursed power. A straightforward battle-lover, he is one of the heavy hitters Yuta and the others must overcome in the Tokyo colonies.

77.content: A Heian-era genius reincarnated in the Culling Game who was infatuated with SUKUNA in her own time. Her CONSTRUCTION technique builds matter from cursed energy on a virtuoso level — armor, weapons, and a deadly liquid-metal form. Eccentric and love-obsessed, she seeks out Sukuna (in Megumi's body) for a final "marriage" duel, providing him a key opportunity in the late arc.

key: ฮานะ คุรุสุ
78.content: A Culling Game player who shares her body with ANGEL, an ancient sorcerer-spirit from the Heian era (the two coexist rather than one overwriting the other). Angel's cursed technique is TECHNIQUE EXTINGUISHMENT — the NULLIFICATION of cursed techniques — and its extension JACOB'S LADDER, a pillar of holy light that can erase even special-grade cursed objects, including RYOMEN SUKUNA and the PRISON REALM itself. This makes Hana/Angel the single most sought-after key in the plan to FREE GOJO from the Prison Realm. Hana is a gentle girl searching for Gojo, whom she idolizes; Angel is colder, ruthless, and mission-focused.

key: นาโอบิโตะ เซนิน
79.content: The head of the Zenin clan and a Grade 1 sorcerer who, despite a crude, drunken personality, is one of the fastest fighters alive thanks to his PROJECTION SORCERY — dividing a second into 24 frames; anyone touched who can't keep pace is frozen for a fraction of a second. He fights Dagon in Shibuya alongside Nanami and Maki and is gravely wounded, contributing to the upheaval of the Zenin clan.

key: นาโอยะ เซนิน
80.content: An arrogant, misogynistic Zenin prodigy and Naobito's son who also wields PROJECTION SORCERY (24-frames-per-second speed). A bitter rival to Maki, he embodies the clan's cruelty and entitlement. After the Zenin massacre he is killed and reborn as a vengeful CURSED SPIRIT, hunting Maki and others during the Culling Game era before being put down.

key: ริกะ โอริโมโตะ
ราชินีคำสาป
81.content: Yuta Okkotsu's childhood sweetheart who died in a traffic accident before his eyes. Bound by Yuta's love and guilt, she became a monstrous SPECIAL-GRADE cursed spirit ("Queen of Curses") who violently protected him, making him a danger to everyone around him. In JJK 0 her true nature and the binding between them are resolved; afterward Yuta retains access to a fragment of her immense power as a finite-time partner in battle.

key: ริโกะ อามาไน
82.content: The cheerful teenage girl chosen in 2006 as the STAR PLASMA VESSEL to merge with Tengen. Escorted by young Gojo and Geto, she grew close to them and ultimately wished to keep living a normal life rather than merge. She is shot dead by TOJI FUSHIGURO moments before the choice could be honored — a tragedy that breaks Geto and forever changes Gojo, making her death one of the most consequential events in the backstory.

key: การปลดปล่อยพลัง
การเสริมพลัง
การไหลของพลัง
83.content: Beyond techniques, every sorcerer can spend raw cursed energy two basic ways. OUTPUT is releasing energy outward as a shockwave or barrier-piercing force; high output lets a sorcerer overwhelm or shatter a weaker opponent's defenses. REINFORCEMENT (body strengthening) coats the body in cursed energy to massively boost strength, speed, and durability and to harm curses with bare strikes — the foundation Yuji, Todo and Maki build on. Smooth, uninterrupted FLOW is the mark of mastery: a sorcerer who keeps perfect output even while relaxed (like Nanami or Gojo) wastes nothing and is hardest to catch off guard.

key: การปะทะโดเมน
การปะทะแดนญาณ
84.content: When two COMPLETE Domain Expansions are deployed against each other and their barriers touch, they collide rather than both taking effect. The domain built from the DENSER, more refined cursed energy and the more strongly defined SURE-HIT "wins," overwriting the weaker domain and exposing its caster to the winner's guaranteed-hit effect. This makes domain-vs-domain a terrifying high-stakes gamble (e.g., Gojo vs. Sukuna). To sidestep the clash, some users deploy INCOMPLETE / OPEN domains (like Sukuna's Malevolent Shrine) that drop the sealing wall in exchange for not being overwritten — at the cost of letting targets escape the radius.

key: หุ่นเชิดคำสาป
85.content: Cursed corpses are constructs animated with cursed energy, ranging from simple puppets to fully sentient beings. MASAMICHI YAGA pioneered their creation; his masterwork is PANDA, an "Abrupt Mutated Core" with three independent souls (cores). Other practitioners pilot remote puppets to fight from a distance — most famously KOKICHI MUTA (Mechamaru), who controls a giant mechanical avatar from far away to compensate for his frail body. Cursed corpses can be built for combat, reconnaissance, or labor, and a well-made one carries its creator's technique.

key: วิชาตุ๊กตาฟาง
86.content: NOBARA KUGISAKI's inherited technique, used with a hammer, 4-inch NAILS, and a straw doll. RESONANCE: she links part of a target (hair, blood, flesh) to the doll, then hammers nails into the doll to transmit ranged internal damage to the target wherever they are. HAIRPIN: she detonates nails she has already driven into a surface or body, creating destructive blasts. Channeling cursed energy through a nail into her own body (or another's) can also amplify a strike. The technique is brutal against curses and humans alike and pairs a curse's body and soul as one connected target.

key: วิชาอัตราส่วน
87.content: KENTO NANAMI's inherited technique forcibly imposes a 7:3 RATIO line across any target — object or living body. Striking precisely on that line creates a guaranteed CRITICAL HIT, dealing greatly multiplied damage regardless of where the natural weak point would be. He can also apply the ratio to part of an enemy he has already cut, compounding the damage. Combined with his blunt cursed sword and disciplined, "by the clock" output, the Ratio Technique lets Nanami reliably overpower curses well above a normal Grade 1's expected ceiling, and it underlies his rare BLACK FLASH bursts.

key: วิชาของซุคุนะ
เชือดเฉือน
88.content: RYOMEN SUKUNA's innate slashing technique. DISMANTLE is a standard cutting slash that adjusts to the target's toughness, carving everything in range. CLEAVE adjusts its sharpness per target, slicing weaker things to ribbons with a single mark. His fire technique, FUGA ("Furnace"), unleashes a devastating arrow/blast of flame and is one of jujutsu's most destructive ranged attacks; with reverse cursed technique he can also weaponize positive energy. All of this is amplified inside his open Domain Expansion, MALEVOLENT SHRINE, where Cleave and Dismantle become guaranteed, continuous, and city-leveling. After adapting to MAHORAGA, Sukuna also wields a reality-cutting World Cutting Slash.

key: วิชาฉายภาพ
โปรเจคชั่น
89.content: A Zenin-line technique used by NAOBITO and NAOYA ZENIN. The user divides one second into 24 FRAMES (like film animation) and, by drawing the required poses, moves at blistering, animation-like speed within those frames. The lethal catch is a binding vow: anyone the user touches who CANNOT keep up with the 24-frame "choreography" is frozen in place for a full second — completely defenseless. The same rule binds the user, so a misstep freezes THEM instead, making the technique a high-risk, high-reward speed art that excels against slower opponents.

90.content: Construction creates physical matter out of pure cursed energy. The cost is enormous — building solid material consumes vast energy — so users specialize. MAI ZENIN can efficiently form only a single revolver BULLET at a time. The Heian-era genius YOROZU mastered it to a virtuoso degree, constructing armor, blades, drones, and a deadly liquid-metal "perfect" body on the fly. The technique rewards precision and imagination over raw spam, and is one of the few abilities that can manufacture cursed-energy weapons mid-battle.

key: ดาวเดือดดาล
วิชาเพิ่มมวล
91.content: The special-grade sorcerer YUKI TSUKUMO's technique adds VIRTUAL MASS to herself and to her shikigami GARUDA. By piling on invisible weight, her blows and Garuda's strikes hit with catastrophic, ever-escalating force — effectively turning a punch into a meteor impact. Her ultimate, BLACK HOLE / "Bansho-ten" style finishers, concentrate so much added mass that targets are crushed outright. Star Rage makes Yuki one of the hardest hitters in the series and a direct counter to durable special grades.

key: วิชาสัตว์มงคล
ผนึกสัตว์มงคล
92.content: TAKUMA INO's technique forms hand-seals to summon spirit-like GUARDIAN BEASTS that fight, scout, and support him in battle. Each beast offers different functions (assault, defense, mobility), letting Ino punch above his Grade 2 ranking by coordinating beasts with his own combat. He uses it to great effect leading squads during the Shibuya Incident.

key: วิชาควบคุมอีกา
ควบคุมอีกา
93.content: MEI MEI's technique lets her command CROWS — for scouting, surveillance, and attack. She can perceive through her birds across great distances and swarm enemies with them. Her finisher, BLACK BIRD MANEUVER, channels a large amount of cursed energy into a single crow, turning it into a devastating explosive strike capable of bisecting powerful curses. The technique's flexibility and reach make the money-driven Mei Mei a feared Grade 1 mercenary.

key: วิชาแม่เหล็กดาว
เลิฟแรนเดวู
94.content: KIRARA HOSHI's astrology-themed technique. Kirara plants invisible "STARS" on people and objects, then magnetically PUSHES and PULLS marked targets toward or away from one another, dictating movement across the battlefield. Once two targets are linked, the bind cannot be undone until Kirara meets the marked person face-to-face — a powerful control and lockdown tool used for support, repositioning allies, and trapping enemies during the Culling Game and final war.

key: การพนันมรณะ
รถไฟรักบริสุทธิ์
95.comment: Technique — Idle Death Gamble / Private Pure Love Train (Hakari)
95.content: KINJI HAKARI's gambling-based technique culminates in his Domain Expansion, IDLE DEATH GAMBLE ("Private Pure Love Train"): a domain containing a pachinko/slot machine. When the reels hit the JACKPOT, Hakari enters a roughly 4-minute, 1-in-239 buff during which he gains a NEAR-INFINITE pool of cursed energy and AUTOMATIC reverse-cursed-technique healing — effectively making him immortal and unkillable while it lasts. Even a "loss" still grants him a steady energy trickle. The setup gamble is risky, but a hit makes Hakari one of the most powerful sorcerers of the younger generation.

96.content: HIROMI HIGURUMA's justice-themed technique. His shikigami JUDGEMAN can instantly learn and recite the rules of any space, person, or situation. His Domain Expansion, DEADLY SENTENCING (a courtroom), holds a TRIAL: the accused must prove innocence under Judgeman's rules. A GUILTY verdict strips the convicted of their CURSED TECHNIQUE entirely and manifests the EXECUTIONER'S SWORD in Higuruma's hands — a blade that can kill almost anything in a single stroke, even an immortal, by carrying a lethal "death sentence." It is one of the deadliest domains in the series.

key: วิชาสายฟ้า
สัตว์ในตำนานอำพัน
97.content: HAJIME KASHIMO's technique converts his own cursed energy into raw ELECTRICITY, channeled through his staff GENJU for ranged bolts and electrified strikes. By accepting a binding vow that condenses his ENTIRE lifetime's worth of cursed energy, he transforms into MYTHICAL BEAST AMBER, a supercharged lightning-form with overwhelming power and speed meant to last only a short time. Kashimo, a battle-obsessed reincarnated Heian sorcerer, built this technique specifically to challenge the strongest — above all Sukuna.

key: วิชาควบคุมท้องฟ้า
บิดท้องฟ้า
98.comment: Technique — Sky Manipulation / Thin Ice Breaker (Uro)
98.content: TAKAKO URO's Heian-era technique treats the SKY (the space above) as a tangible SURFACE she can grab, warp, and lash. With THIN ICE BREAKER she distorts that surface to deflect attacks, redirect movement, and strike with twisting blasts of warped space. The ability makes ranged and aerial combat extremely dangerous around her and lets her counter even spatial techniques.

เกรไนต์บลาสต์
99.content: RYU ISHIGORI's technique is deceptively simple: he charges and fires GRANITE BLAST, a beam of nearly pure, unrefined cursed energy of staggering volume. Backed by his enormous Heian-era reserves, the beam's sheer output can overwhelm most defenses by brute force. Its strength scales with charge time, making Ishigori a relentless artillery-style fighter in the Culling Game.

key: วิชาลอกเลียน

100.content: YUTA OKKOTSU's gift is COPY: by touching or analyzing a sorcerer (often after exchanging a sample, like sharing blood), he can temporarily REPLICATE that person's cursed technique and use it as his own. Combined with his colossal natural cursed-energy reserves, a cursed sword that stores energy, and his bond with the special-grade curse RIKA (whom he can manifest as a limited-time monstrous partner with her own pseudo-domain "AUTHENTIC MUTUAL LOVE"), Copy makes Yuta one of the most versatile and powerful sorcerers alive — able to turn an enemy's own technique against them.

key: วิชาน้ำแข็ง
ฟรอสต์คาล์ม
101.content: URAUME's technique, ICE FORMATION, generates and shapes ICE for offense and defense — freezing spikes, walls, and a wide-area attack named FROST CALM that flash-freezes everything in range. As Sukuna's ancient, loyal servant, Uraume uses this technique to support the King of Curses and to neutralize multiple enemies at once during the final arc.

key: เปลวเพลิงหายนะ
วิชาภูเขาไฟ
102.content: JOGO, the volcano Disaster Curse, manipulates EXTREME HEAT, MAGMA, and FIRE. He hurls molten projectiles, erupts the ground, and summons EMBER INSECTS (burning bug swarms). His Maximum technique, MAXIMUM: METEOR, drops a colossal blazing mass on a target with apocalyptic force, and his Domain Expansion COFFIN OF THE IRON MOUNTAIN turns the area into a volcanic hell. His flames are hot enough to threaten almost anyone — though they are useless against Gojo's Infinity.

103.content: HANAMI, the nature Disaster Curse, manipulates PLANTS and WOOD grown from its own body. It fires hardened wooden projectiles, ensnares foes in roots and vines, and plants parasitic SEEDS/FLOWERS in enemies that bloom to DRAIN their cursed energy and life. Hanami can also harden parts of its body into wood for defense. The technique embodies nature reclaiming the world from humanity, and it pushed even strong sorcerers to their limits at the Kyoto Goodwill Event.

104.content: DAGON, the sea Disaster Curse, evolved from a Cursed Womb and manipulates water and an endless SWARM of fish-like SHIKIGAMI. Inside his Domain Expansion, HORIZON OF THE CAPTIVATING SKANDHA — a deceptively peaceful beach/ocean realm — these shikigami are produced without limit and attack everyone trapped inside as a guaranteed, unending tide, overwhelming multiple Grade 1 sorcerers at once.

วิชาเลียนแบบ
105.content: GRANNY OGAMI and her grandson use a body/soul technique that can RECREATE a dead person inside a living host. Given a target's DNA and a vessel, the grandson physically transforms into the deceased and can wield their cursed technique. Kenjaku's faction uses this in Shibuya to resurrect TOJI FUSHIGURO's combat ability — though the real Toji's will eventually reasserts itself, overriding the puppet.

106.content: MOMO NISHIMIYA flies on a witch-style BROOM and manipulates WIND for high-speed flight, aerial reconnaissance, and gusting attacks. Her airborne vantage makes her an excellent scout and support fighter, relaying enemy positions to teammates during large engagements.

107.content: REGGIE STAR, a cunning Culling Game player, can MATERIALIZE any object for which he holds a valid purchase RECEIPT — from a vending-machine drink to a full-size truck — summoning it instantly into battle. The bigger the purchase, the bigger the weapon. Combined with his contract-and-loophole mindset, the technique makes him a flexible, unpredictable opponent who weaponizes consumerism itself.

108.comment: Technique — Garden of the Star Magician (Charles Bernard)
108.content: CHARLES BERNARD, an aspiring mangaka and Culling Game player, can SEE the immediate FUTURE of anyone whose "cursed energy line" he reads — perceiving their next moves slightly before they happen, as if reading panels of a manga he draws in real time. The more he understands an opponent's rhythm, the further ahead he can predict, letting him dodge and counter attacks that should be unavoidable.

key: ห้วงอนันต์
อันลิมิเต็ดวอยด์
109.content: SATORU GOJO's Domain Expansion, built on LIMITLESS. Anyone caught inside is flooded with INFINITE information — every sensation, every piece of data, all at once and forever — paralyzing the brain. Victims are left frozen, unable to move, think, or even die normally, receiving "too much" to process while only fractions of a second pass outside. It is a near-perfect incapacitation domain: it neutralizes almost any number of opponents at once without killing them outright, and breaking free requires extraordinary mental fortitude or a counter-domain.

110.content: RYOMEN SUKUNA's Domain Expansion: a Buddhist-shrine realm of bones and a skinless figure. Uniquely, it is an INCOMPLETE / OPEN domain — Sukuna omits the sealing wall, which means it does NOT trap targets but also cannot be overwritten in a domain clash, and it projects its guaranteed-hit area over a massive radius even without a barrier. Within it, CLEAVE and DISMANTLE strike automatically and ceaselessly, butchering everything caught in range. In Shibuya it leveled entire city blocks. The open form is possible because Sukuna's sure-hit is refined enough to function without enclosure.

111.content: MAHITO's Domain Expansion manifests a grotesque interior filled with hands and twisted forms. Inside, his IDLE TRANSFIGURATION (soul-touch) becomes a SURE HIT: anything Mahito's manifested hands touch has its soul — and thus body — reshaped or destroyed instantly, with no defense possible. It is one of the deadliest kill-domains in the series; surviving it requires destroying the domain's heart, escaping before completion, or a counter such as Simple Domain.

112.content: MEGUMI FUSHIGURO's Domain Expansion, an INCOMPLETE domain flooding the area with a sea of liquid SHADOW. Within it Megumi can summon and resummon his TEN SHADOWS shikigami freely and instantly, move through the shadow at will, and overwhelm enemies with relentless beasts from every direction. Because he has not perfected the sure-hit binding, it functions as a powerful battlefield-control and summoning domain rather than a guaranteed-kill one — already a remarkable feat for a sorcerer his age.

113.comment: Domain — Coffin of the Iron Mountain (Jogo)
113.content: JOGO's Domain Expansion turns the enclosed space into the interior of an active VOLCANO — searing heat, magma, and ash flood every target inside as a guaranteed effect, cooking opponents alive. Powerful as it is, it was utterly nullified when used against Gojo, whose Infinity and superior domain rendered Jogo's flames meaningless — a defining demonstration of Gojo's supremacy.

114.comment: Domain — Horizon of the Captivating Skandha (Dagon)
114.content: DAGON's Domain Expansion, a tranquil-looking BEACH and OCEAN realm that hides a lethal trap: it endlessly spawns Dagon's fish-like SHIKIGAMI, which attack everyone inside as a guaranteed, unceasing tide. The domain overwhelmed Nanami, Naobito, and Maki simultaneously and was only broken when TOJI FUSHIGURO smashed through its barrier from outside, illustrating that a domain can be defeated by attacking its physical shell.

115.content: Domain Amplification coats the user in a thin layer of their own DOMAIN, projecting the domain's barrier directly onto their body. Because cursed techniques are NEUTRALIZED upon contact with a domain barrier, anything that touches the amplified user has its technique nullified — letting them walk through, deflect, or cancel incoming cursed techniques (and even another sorcerer's Infinity, momentarily). MAHITO and HANAMI use it offensively to bypass defenses; it is a key counter to technique-reliant fighters, but it consumes significant cursed energy to maintain.

โดเมนเรียบง่าย
116.content: Simple Domain (簡易領域) is a small, circular defensive barrier (roughly an arm's reach) that AUTOMATICALLY DESTROYS any cursed technique that enters its radius. Its purpose is to counter an enemy Domain Expansion's SURE-HIT: within the Simple Domain, the guaranteed hit is neutralized, buying the user a chance to survive or escape. It is a hallmark of the NEW SHADOW STYLE and is used by KUSAKABE, MIWA, and others; even non-special-grade sorcerers can resist domains with it, though it is purely defensive and demanding to hold.

key: ตะกร้าสานกลวง

วิชาต้านโดเมน
117.content: Esoteric Technique: HOLLOW WICKER BASKET is an ANTI-DOMAIN technique and the older PREDECESSOR to the NEW SHADOW STYLE's SIMPLE DOMAIN. It is invoked with a hand sign — fingers interlocked, arms extended forward — forming a spherical, woven basket-like SHIELD of cursed energy around the user. Like Simple Domain, it NEUTRALIZES a Domain Expansion's cursed-technique-imbued BARRIER, cancelling that domain's guaranteed SURE-HIT and buying the user a chance to survive or escape. Its limit: it only counters the domain's barrier, NOT cursed techniques themselves, so it is ineffective against incomplete or non-lethal domains. Notably used by the Heian-era sorcerer REGGIE STAR, who deployed it the instant he was trapped in Megumi's Chimera Shadow Garden.

key: อารมณ์ดอกไม้ร่วง
ดาบนิวชาโดว์
118.content: Falling Blossom Emotion is a NEW SHADOW STYLE technique that lets a wielder use cursed energy to CUT THROUGH cursed energy itself — allowing a blade to slice apart an incoming attack or the barrier wall of a Domain Expansion. It is one of the few ways to defend against or breach a domain from the inside, complementing Simple Domain. Skilled swordsmen like Kusakabe rely on it to fight far above their apparent grade.

key: วิชาเงาสำนักใหม่

119.content: The New Shadow Style (新陰流, Shinkage-ryu) is a school of jujutsu SWORDSMANSHIP and barrier defense, valuable because many of its core techniques require little or no innate cursed technique — making them learnable by almost any sorcerer. Its pillars are SIMPLE DOMAIN (anti-domain defense), FALLING BLOSSOM EMOTION (cutting cursed energy), and BATTOJUTSU draw-cuts. Practitioners include ATSUYA KUSAKABE and KASUMI MIWA. The style is the standard "equalizer" that lets ordinary sorcerers survive against domain users.

key: eight-handled sword divergent sila divine general
ชิคิงามิปรับตัว
120.comment: Shikigami — Mahoraga (Eight-Handled Sword Divergent Sila Divine General)
120.content: The strongest shikigami of the TEN SHADOWS TECHNIQUE, summoned only through a dangerous SUBJUGATION RITUAL ("With this treasure, I summon...") that no Ten Shadows user had ever fully tamed. Mahoraga has a spinning wheel of Dharma on its head that ADAPTS to any phenomenon it experiences — physical attacks, cursed techniques, even Gojo's Limitless and reality-cutting slashes — becoming immune to anything it has already endured. Because it cannot be controlled once summoned and adapts to the summoner too, calling Mahoraga is a desperate gambit; Sukuna later exploits Megumi's Mahoraga to adapt to Limitless itself.

key: วิชาของเทนเง็น
บาเรียนิรันดร์
121.content: TENGEN's power combines effective IMMORTALITY with a vast BARRIER technique. Tengen's barriers shield Jujutsu High and key locations across Japan and underpin large-scale spatial constructs (including the framework Kenjaku exploits for the Culling Game). Tengen's immortality is not eternal stability: roughly every 500 years Tengen must merge with a STAR PLASMA VESSEL to "reset," or else evolve into an inhuman state of mind. This barrier mastery is the foundation Kenjaku targets to force the mass MERGER of humanity.

122.content: JUJUTSU KAISEN: MODULO is the sequel manga (by Gege Akutami, illustrated by Yuji Iwasaki), set in Tokyo about 68 YEARS after the Culling Game. The "golden age" of sorcery is long gone, and JUJUTSU has begun MERGING WITH TECHNOLOGY. The central threat is no longer ordinary cursed spirits but the SIMURIANS — an ALIEN race that possesses their own form of cursed energy and arrives on Earth to ABDUCT humans and HARVEST their cursed energy, treating cursed-energy-rich Japan as a prime target. The story follows two young sorcerers, YUKA and TSURUGI OKKOTSU, alongside the Simurian envoy MARU. It is a short, focused serialization of roughly three volumes.

key: มนุษย์ต่างดาว
123.content: The SIMURIANS are an extraterrestrial civilization that wields its OWN form of CURSED ENERGY — a major shift in the setting, since cursed energy was previously thought purely human-born. They come to Earth (and especially Japan, the planet's "cursed-energy capital") to ABDUCT people and HARVEST their cursed energy. Simurians possess a distinctive THIRD EYE granting potent abilities (the envoy MARU can knock a person unconscious with a single glance). Their arrival reframes the entire mythology of jujutsu — culminating in the revelation that even RYOMEN SUKUNA may share an alien (Simurian) origin.

key: ต้นกำเนิดซุคุนะ
ซุคุนะเอเลี่ยน
124.content: A central revelation of MODULO recontextualizes the entire franchise: RYOMEN SUKUNA — long believed to be a Heian-era human sorcerer turned demon — is tied to the SIMURIAN (alien) lineage, implying that humanity's cursed energy and Sukuna himself may have extraterrestrial roots. This connects the King of Curses directly to the alien Simurians threatening Earth in the sequel, retroactively casting the original series' mythology in a new, cosmic light.

key: ยูกะ อกคตสึ
125.content: A protagonist of MODULO and GRANDDAUGHTER of YUTA OKKOTSU and MAKI ZENIN. Yuka is a driven young sorcerer with strong cursed energy who fights with a feral CLAW style: in combat her nails grow long and sharp and her hands surge with cursed energy. Her techniques include SAVAGE JAW STRIKE (a claw-shaped fist loaded with cursed energy) and BITING TWIST (a flurry of clawed strikes into the opponent's abdomen). She has also shown access to the TEN SHADOWS lineage — notably summoning MAHORAGA through a subjugation ritual at great personal cost. She and her brother strive to prove themselves worthy of YUTA'S RING.

key: ทสึรุงิ อกคตสึ
126.content: A protagonist of MODULO and the other GRANDCHILD of YUTA OKKOTSU and MAKI ZENIN. Like his grandmother Maki, Tsurugi has LOW cursed energy and instead fights as a CURSED TOOL user with refined NEW SHADOW STYLE swordsmanship, wielding a cursed blade called HONOYAGI. Skilled and disciplined but burdened by self-doubt over whether he deserves Yuta's legacy, he is the steadier counterpart to his sister Yuka in the fight against the Simurians.

key: ทูตซิมูเรียน
127.comment: Modulo NPC — Maru (Marulu Val Vol Yelvori)
127.content: MARU (full name MARULU VAL VOL YELVORI) is a SIMURIAN sent to Earth as an inspector/DIPLOMAT to Japan, the planet's cursed-energy capital. He possesses a THIRD EYE that, with a single glance, can instantly render a person UNCONSCIOUS, among other alien abilities tied to the Simurians' cursed energy. His true allegiance and intentions are a driving mystery of the sequel as he becomes entangled with Yuka and Tsurugi.

key: เรกกี้ สตาร์
128.content: A shrewd, contract-obsessed Culling Game player who battles Yuji and Megumi in the Tokyo No.1 Colony. His RECEIPT TECHNIQUE lets him materialize any object he holds a purchase receipt for — including trucks and heavy gear — making him an unpredictable, resourceful opponent who fights by exploiting rules and loopholes rather than brute strength.

key: ชาร์ลส์ เบอร์นาร์ด
129.content: An eccentric aspiring mangaka and Culling Game player who duels Hajime Kashimo. His technique, GARDEN OF THE STAR MAGICIAN, lets him read an opponent's "cursed energy line" to PREDICT their next moves slightly in advance, as though sketching the next manga panel — granting near-precognitive dodging and counters in a fight.

130.content: A powerful foreign sorcerer reincarnated/placed into the Culling Game, who fights Megumi in the Tokyo No.1 Colony. A formidable close-range combatant with a piercing attack that ignores ordinary defenses, Dhruv pushes Megumi to summon Mahoraga, marking an early escalation in the Culling Game arc.

131.content: An elderly curse-user allied with Kenjaku's faction who, with her grandson, performs a RESURRECTION/IMPERSONATION technique: given a target's DNA and a host body, the grandson transforms into a dead person and wields their cursed technique. In Shibuya they revive TOJI FUSHIGURO's fighting prowess to attack Megumi — until the real Toji's will overrides the puppet and turns on them.

132.content: ANGEL's (Hana Kurusu's) cursed technique. Its base form, TECHNIQUE EXTINGUISHMENT, is pure NULLIFICATION: it can erase any cursed technique it affects, even undoing techniques and seals already in place — which is why it is the one ability believed able to release GOJO from the PRISON REALM. Its extension, JACOB'S LADDER, conjures a four-winged trumpet of light beneath a vast multi-layered magic array (a heptagram ringed with crosses) in the sky; when the trumpet sounds, a PILLAR OF HOLY LIGHT descends and EXTINGUISHES whatever it bathes — including special-grade cursed objects such as RYOMEN SUKUNA and the Prison Realm. It is regarded as one of the most powerful techniques in the series. It does not, however, restore what it erases.

key: ดาบุระ คาราบะ
133.content: The principal antagonist of JUJUTSU KAISEN: MODULO. Dabura Karaba is a SIMURIAN from Deskunte and the chief representative of the alien refugees who arrive on Earth. Jujutsu Headquarters classifies him as a threat EQUIVALENT TO RYOMEN SUKUNA — the strongest force of the sequel era. He wields two cursed techniques, LIGHT and MURDEROUS INTENT, and during his battle against MAHORAGA he masters both REVERSE CURSED TECHNIQUE and CURSED TECHNIQUE REVERSAL — learning to turn his light into DARKNESS — and unveils a Domain Expansion built to defeat Mahoraga's adaptation in a single stroke. Calm, brilliant, and utterly formidable, he is the embodiment of the Simurian threat that reframes jujutsu as a cosmic, interplanetary conflict.

key: วิชาเจตนาสังหาร

134.content: DABURA KARABA's two Simurian cursed techniques. LIGHT lets him generate and shape light for devastating destruction and to form solid light CONSTRUCTS that control the battlefield. MURDEROUS INTENT gives killing intent TANGIBLE FORM, allowing him to inflict real damage with intent alone — an attack with no physical medium to block. After reversing the flow of cursed energy through his circuit (inspired by observing Maru), he gains CURSED TECHNIQUE REVERSAL, converting his LIGHT into DARKNESS, and REVERSE CURSED TECHNIQUE for healing. The combination is regarded in-universe as rivaling or exceeding Gojo's Limitless in raw threat.

135.comment: Domain — Otherworld Between Darkness and Light: Reverse Transcendence (Dabura)
135.content: DABURA KARABA's Domain Expansion (also rendered "Defined Crossing of Light and Dark"). Within it, Dabura freely manipulates both LIGHT and DARKNESS — his cursed technique AND its reversal at once — making it a near-inescapable kill-space. He devised it specifically to overcome MAHORAGA, reasoning that a domain combining a technique and its reversal could defeat the adaptive shikigami in one fell swoop. To expand it he forms the mudra of MARICI, the Buddhist deity of light and the sun. It debuts as one of the most powerful domains shown in the entire franchise.

<ui_system name="Tracker">
## PURPOSE
Render the cursed-energy FIELD REPORT card at the very TOP of every response. It is invisible to the reader (drawn as a card by regex), so never describe it in prose.

## OUTPUT FORMAT — one line, no spaces around the pipes:
[TRACK|{day}|{date}|{time}|{arc}|{region}|{locale}|{position}|{weather}|{cursed_energy}|{user_stance}|{situation}]

## FIELD DEFINITIONS (11 fields, ALWAYS all 11, in this order)
1. {day}     — Weekday (modern-Japan calendar), e.g. "Friday / 金曜日".
2. {date}    — Full date INCLUDING THE YEAR, e.g. "October 31st, 2018". Carry the year so time can pass. The canon present is autumn 2018; respect the chosen era.
3. {time}    — 24-hour clock (e.g. 18:42). Advance 5–30 minutes per response.
4. {arc}     — Current story arc (e.g. "Cursed Womb Arc", "Shibuya Incident Arc", "Culling Game Arc", or an original arc name).
5. {region}  — Prefecture / region (e.g. "Tokyo", "Saitama", "Sendai Colony").
6. {locale}  — Town, district, or named place (e.g. "Tokyo Jujutsu High", "Shibuya Station").
7. {position}— The EXACT spot within the locale (which building / room / stretch of street, max ~80 chars). Write in the user's language.
8. {weather} — Clear / Overcast / Fog / Drizzle / Rain / Storm / Snow / Cold / Hot / Windy. Write in the user's language.
9. {cursed_energy} — The local cursed-energy density / threat read for the scene, e.g. "Faint — residuals only", "Grade 3 presence", "Grade 1 — special-grade signature detected", "Domain active". This is the JJK threat gauge; keep it tense and accurate.
10. {user_stance} — {{user}}'s exact physical posture / stance right now (max ~80 chars). Write in the user's language.
11. {situation}   — One sentence of current scene context / immediate goal (max ~80 chars). Write in the user's language.

## RULES
1. Place [TRACK|...] on its OWN line at the VERY START of every response.
2. Update {time}, {position}, {user_stance}, {situation}, and {cursed_energy} every response; advance {date} as days pass.
3. Never skip the tracker. Never put prose before it.

## EXAMPLE (EN)
[TRACK|Friday|October 31st, 2018|18:42|Shibuya Incident Arc|Tokyo|Shibuya Station — B5 Concourse|Crouched behind a toppled vending machine, breath held|Overcast, drizzle|Grade 1 — special-grade signature detected|Cursed energy coiled tight at the fingertips, ready to strike|A transfigured human shambles between you and the only sealed exit.]

## EXAMPLE (TH)
[TRACK|วันศุกร์|31 ตุลาคม 2018|18:42|อาร์กเหตุการณ์ชิบุยะ|โตเกียว|สถานีชิบุยะ — ชั้นใต้ดิน B5|ย่อตัวหลังตู้กดน้ำที่ล้ม กลั้นหายใจ|ครึ้มฟ้า ฝนปรอย|เกรด 1 — ตรวจพบสัญญาณระดับพิเศษ|รวบพลังต้องคำสาปไว้ที่ปลายนิ้ว พร้อมจู่โจม|มนุษย์ที่ถูกแปลงร่างคืบคลานขวางระหว่างคุณกับทางออกเดียวที่ถูกผนึก]
</ui_system>
